list.title: Stock management
list.syncedFromErp: Stock data is synchronized automatically from the ERP
list.search: Search by stock name or ERP code...
list.loadError: An error occurred while loading data.

detail.title: Stock details
detail.subtitle: Manage stock information, images, and linked items
detail.basicInfoReadonly: Basic fields are synced from the ERP and cannot be edited here
detail.htmlDescriptionDesc: Description used for web output and documents
detail.notFoundDesc: This stock may have been removed or was never created.
detail.tipDescription: Save your changes after editing. With ERP integration, fields may refresh on the next sync.
detail.relationHint: Define sub- or parent products linked to this stock.

images.upload: Drag images here or click to browse
images.noImagesDesc: There are no images for this stock.
images.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this image?

relations.quantity.positive: Quantity must be greater than zero
relations.isMandatoryDesc: When this option is selected, it becomes mandatory for this sub-product to be deducted from stock when the main product is sold.
relations.noRelationsDesc: Use the form on the left to add relationships.

messages.favoriteToggleError: Favorite status could not be updated

bulkImport.title: Bulk stock image upload
bulkImport.description: Upload one ZIP. The system reads the ERP stock code from the ZIP folder structure and adds the images to the matched stock in the background, just like a manual upload.
bulkImport.rule1: Folders inside the ZIP should be grouped by ERP stock code.
bulkImport.rule3: If the stock code is found, the images are added to that stock as if they were uploaded manually; if not, only that file is skipped.
bulkImport.rule4: Large archives are processed as a Hangfire background job. This field expects a ZIP archive.
bulkImport.uploadHint: Drag and drop the ZIP file here or choose a file

mirrorCreate.title: Mirror Stok Aç
mirrorCreate.description: ERP'de henüz açılmamış stoğu önce SalesDesk mirror stoğu olarak oluşturun. Sonra listeden tek tuşla Netsis stok kartına dönüştürebilirsiniz.
mirrorCreate.groupDescription: Grup ve özel kodlar katalog/filtre yapısında kullanılacak şekilde opsiyonel girilebilir.
